## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] 📝 Docs
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm -r typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm -r build` and `pnpm --filter @daily-alt/extension build:firefox` both succeed
- [ ] Added a new numbered SQL migration if the DB schema changed (didn't edit an applied one)
- [ ] **No trackers/analytics/third-party SDKs added to the extension; no personal data moved off-device**
- [ ] Updated docs/README if behavior or setup changed
